writing.task1:
Dear HR
I saw a new deduction called “Wellness Program Fee” on my pay slip. This fee was not in my work contract. My contract only allows agreed deductions, so I do not understand the basis for this charge. Could you please explain why it was added? I kindly ask for a refund of this fee or an option to opt out of the program
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree that street cameras with license-plate recognition should be used to deter crime. They can help police find stolen cars and track suspects quickly, as shown in many cities where crime dropped after camera were added. A strong counter-argument is that such systems may harm privacy and cost too much. But if laws set clear limit on data use and audits keep the system fair, the safety benềnit are greater than the risks
writing.task3: Plan A is balanced, with good speed (62 Mbps), fair reliability (0.8% downtime), and mid cost ($8). Plan B is slower (55 Mbps) but most reliable (0.3%), though costly ($11). Plan C is fastest (68 Mbps) and cheapest ($6) but least reliable (1.1%). If reliability is most important, Plan B works best. If cost and speed matter more, Plan C is attractive. I suggest Plan A as a balance. KPI: monthly downtime rate
